title: Use package metadata fallback for __version__ in python backend

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implementing fix for installed-environment version lookup by using importlib.metadata with fallback, instead of requiring ../../../../VERSION to exist.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Patched python/src/virtuus/_python/__init__.py to resolve version via importlib.metadata.version('virtuus') with fallback to repo VERSION file for source-tree use. Validated via py_compile and by installing editable Virtuus into Call-Criteria-Python env; import virtuus,biblicus now succeeds.
